title: App Settings - General - About - New update available
scenario: Verify that the About section displays update information and handles Release Notes and Update button interactions when an app update is available on the Cloud.
steps: 1. Ensure an app update is available on the Cloud.
2. Navigate to the General section and tap on About.
3. Verify that the About section displays 'App Updates Needed' text.
4. Verify that an 'Update' button is visible.
5. Verify that the current and available FW versions are displayed.
6. Verify that a link to Release Notes is present.
8. Verify that the release notes page opens.
9. Tap the 'X' button on the Release Notes page.
10. Verify that the Release Notes closes and returns to the General section with About expanded.
12. Verify that the app store page for Poly Lens opens.
expected: The About section under General displays 'App Updates Needed' text, an 'Update' button, current and available FW versions, and a link to Release Notes. Tapping the Release Notes link opens the release notes page. Tapping the 'X' button closes the Release Notes and returns to the General section with About expanded. Tapping the 'Update' button opens the app store page for Poly Lens.
